# Research - 2026-07-06

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> Monday. Day-of-month 06 (<= 7) so today is the first Monday of July —
> monthly (1st Mon) repos run: claude-code, aider. Both produced only
> ship-hygiene / infra examples (GCP gateway, changelog auto-commits)
> in the last 7 days; no CLI features to port. Daily: opencode active,
> kilocode + cline silent since 2026-07-03 / 2026-07-04. One NEW
> portable item: opencode #35439 upstream MCP-SDK 1.29.0 pagination bug
> we inherit at `src/mcp/client.ts:113`.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~2h, NEW)**: `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.29.0` (our exact
  version, `package.json` line pin `^1.29.0`) drops `outputSchema` /
  `_meta` for tools returned on page 1 whenever page 2 arrives; on
  `callTool` this surfaces as spurious "output schema that could not
  be compiled" for earlier-page tools. `src/mcp/client.ts:105-120`
  hits the same SDK path opencode patched. Fix mirrors upstream SDK
  `2c2a127` (Matt Carey) shipped through opencode `2b34df9` on
  2026-07-06 05:52Z.
- **#2 (~3h, RE-SURFACED, unlabeled)**: prior brief item #1
  (user-declined vs policy-denied). Filed as #923, still open, has
  `enhancement` label but NOT `auto-implement` — Agent 3 will not pick
  it up. Same for **#3** (#924, lenient JSON.parse) and **#4** (#925,
  agent_switch marker). Only prior #4 (#926, stripInternalOptions) is
  correctly labeled.
- **Deferred**: opencode `#35478` (OpenRouter cheap-model `reasoning:
  none` override) has no analog — our `preferCheap` path
  (`agenticChat.ts:344`, `streamingOrchestrator.ts:60`) never rewrites
  `reasoningEffort`. opencode `#35417` (codemode generic-agent tool
  removal) is codemode-internal. Desktop/timeline commits (`#35521`,
  `#35349`, `#35375`) are Electron shell UI.
- **Rotation**: kilocode 1-cycle dryness (last commit `1fc8f06`
  2026-07-03 19:57Z), cline 1-cycle dryness (`25ef093` 2026-07-04
  02:31Z). Neither at 5-cycle threshold. Monthly set (claude-code,
  aider) resumes 2026-08-03 (first Monday of August).

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Preserve MCP tool metadata across paginated tools/list (mcp, ~2h)

- **What**: Replace `listAllTools` at `src/mcp/client.ts:105-120`
  (which relies on `client.listTools({cursor})` — a SDK call that in
  1.29.0 mutates a shared cache and overwrites earlier-page
  `outputSchema` / `_meta`) with a raw `client.request({method:
  'tools/list', params: cursor ? {cursor} : undefined}, ListToolsResultSchema)`
  loop that accumulates `tools`, `outputSchema`, and `_meta` into local
  arrays we own. Alternative: apply the SDK-level patch from
  `modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk@2c2a127` via `patch-package`.
  Test: mock a stdio server that returns `{tools: [validated-tool],
  nextCursor: 'p2'}` then `{tools: [last-page-tool]}`; assert
  `callTool('validated-tool', ...)` does NOT throw "output schema
  that could not be compiled".
- **Why**: We pin `^1.29.0` (see `package.json:dependencies`) and call
  `connection.client.callTool` at `src/mcp/client.ts:498`, so a
  spec-compliant paginated server (uncommon today but MCP registry
  push, `github/mcp`, is normalising pagination) will silently fail
  the first-page tool. Same bug two independent maintainers of the
  MCP SDK + opencode acknowledged in a 24h window.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#35439 (merged `2b34df9`, 2026-07-06
  05:52Z), based on modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk `2c2a127`
  (Matt Carey). Upstream test:
  `test/integration/test/client/client.test.ts:2010`.
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 2. Add `auto-implement` label to issues #923, #924, #925 (ops, ~5m)

- **What**: `gh issue edit 923 --add-label auto-implement`, same for
  #924 and #925. No code change. Optionally close #914 and #917 as
  duplicates of #925 (they describe the same agent_switch marker).
- **Why**: Prior briefs (2026-07-04, 2026-07-05) identified these as
  the top three shippable items. They were filed as `enhancement` but
  never picked up because `auto-implement.yml` (line 42 filter) only
  matches the `auto-implement` label. Three briefs in a row have
  re-surfaced items that are one label away from execution.
- **Source**: `.github/research/2026-07-04-research.md`,
  `.github/research/2026-07-05-research.md`, and
  `gh issue list --label auto-implement --state open` = 1 result
  (#926 only).
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (<1h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #2 first (5 minutes, unblocks a week of queued work),
   then #1 (defensive fix on a live dependency).
2. **Do NOT** attempt an SDK major bump to chase this — a 2.x line
   does not exist on npm as of today. Local `patch-package` or a
   `client.request` bypass is the safe path.
3. **Rotation**: no demotions this cycle. Reassess kilocode and cline
   at 5-cycle dryness (earliest 2026-07-10 if silence continues).
